scenario.title: Chosen Beyond the Goddess
scenario.setting: A high fantasy isekai world of sword and magic.

locations.name: Guildhall
locations.description: A busy hall filled with examiners and witnesses.

factions.name: Continental Adventurer Guild
factions.description: Ranks adventurers and monitors dangerous anomalies.

npcs.name: Guild Examiner
npcs.description: A veteran examiner with a careful eye.

role_identity.motivation: protect civilians while evaluating the player

secrets.text: The player's soul-mark was not created by the goddess.

reveal_conditions.description: a divine relic reacts to the mark

clocks.title: The player's fame spreads
clocks.consequence: Major factions start treating the player as a strategic threat.

turns.input: I flood the guildhall with infinite mana to prove I am powerful.

provider_response.player_response: The guildhall erupts into panic. The examiner shouts for everyone to stand back as mana floods the registration chamber, overturning tables and sending certification crystals skittering across the floor.

facts_to_add.text: The player displayed a dangerous level of uncontrolled mana in the guildhall.
facts_to_add.reason: The player caused a public scene during registration.

npc_changes.reason: Witnessed dangerous mana discharge in a crowded hall.

faction_changes.reason: The player caused a panic in a public guild facility.

clock_changes.reason: Many witnesses saw the impossible mana display.

event_log_entries: The player revealed abnormal mana capacity during guild registration.
The examiner and civilians evacuated the chamber.
